name: Cobie Smulders
description: Cobie Smulders, born on April 3, 1982, in Vancouver, Canada, had a passion for acting from a young age. Starting her career as a model, she ventured into acting and gained fame with her role as Robin Scherbatsky in "How I Met Your Mother." Cobie's talent and beauty caught the attention of Marvel Studios, leading to her portrayal of Agent Maria Hill in the Marvel Cinematic Universe. With a successful career, Cobie balances her work with her family life and various hobbies. Despite her fame, she remains grounded and approachable, making her a beloved figure in Hollywood.
creator: deadcool
